label: Meridian Ledgerhouse Sleep Bay
description: Meridian Ledgerhouse Sleep Bay is a narrow, enclosed compartment partitioned from the habitation suite by a sliding plasteel bulkhead with a gasketed seal. Fixed bunks are recessed into the walls and secured with restraint webbing, their frames integrated into the paneling scored by service numerals and maintenance stencils. Low lumen strip-lighting runs along the ceiling conduit trunk, producing an even, blackout-suitable glow across scuffed deck plating. A vented grille and armored junction box dominate one corner, asserting the room’s dependence on filtered circulation and redundant life-support routing.
